videos.name: Project Hail Mary: Creating Rocky - Featurette
videos.description: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up alone on a spaceship light-years from Earth. As his memory returns, he uncovers a mission to stop a mysterious substance killing the sun, and save Earth. An unexpected friendship may be the key.

videos.name: Ryan Gosling Makes Movie Magic With 'Project Hail Mary'
videos.description: Stars Ryan Gosling and Sandra Hüller, along with directors Christopher Miller and Phil Lord, discuss adapting the beloved story of 'Project Hail Mary.' The actors and directors talk about their collaborative process, what it takes to create those magical moments in film, and the facts about space that still blow their minds.

videos.name: Final Trailer
videos.description: Science teacher Ryland Grace (Ryan Gosling) wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction… but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.

videos.name: Official Trailer
videos.description:
Science teacher Ryland Grace (Ryan Gosling) wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction… but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.

Directed by Phil Lord and Christopher Miller ('The Lego Movie') and based on the novel by Andy Weir, 'Project Hail Mary' also stars Sandra Hüller ('Anatomy of a Fall'), Lionel Boyce ("The Bear"), Ken Leung ("Industry"), and Milana Vayntrub ("This Is Us"). Coming soon only in theaters.

videos.name: Project Hail Mary Official Trailer
